calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Two Amendments To Declaration Of Common Interest Development
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN S. WEIL, ESQ. of Berding & Weil LLP, Tel No. 925-838-2090 appearing for the Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued and submitted by Petitioner's counsel. The Court takes PETITIONER THE BRANNAN OWNERS ASSOCIATION's Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Two Amendments To Declaration Of Common Interest Development under submission. Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)
